description: A designed graphic styled as a music-player screen. The album-art area is a black-and-white photograph of a man with white-gray hair in a dark suit leaning forward with both hands flat on the reflective surface of the Resolute Desk, with flags behind him. Below, a song title 'All I Do Is Win' is credited to 'DJ Khaled', with a progress bar reading '0:23' and '3:52' and standard playback control icons.
notable_text: All I Do Is Win; DJ Khaled; 0:23; 3:52
